name: ASUS ROG STRIX B650E-E GAMING WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 2x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - Support DDR5-6400+(OC) - 4x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen 2x2 Type-C - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - Intel 2.5GbE LAN - 802.11ax Wi-Fi 6E
